Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Straighten your back! And don't forget to swing your arms![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Coach! Guess what, guess what! I beat Yuki-chan![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I swung my arms really hard, just like you said![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Okay, next time I want you to try running with your toes raised.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You'll go even faster that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I did a lot of research on this, so I'm glad to see it's actually working.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I mean, now that I've agreed to coach them, I gotta do a good job, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I even used the school library for the first time, to put together a training routine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I gotta say though, I'm amazed how much their times have improved just from correcting their form.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Elementary school kids really learn fast, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And it's motivating for us too, when we can see the results.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I guess it might be for someone as athletic as you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}...But hearing you say so does make me feel like I can do anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}These kids really give it their all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Hrrraaaaaah! Thousand Demon Sprint![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}*pant* *pant* Okay, one more round![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}You're all supposed to be on break right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It's important to take time to get good rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Kids your age need to be careful not to overdo it. You could get really hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Yeah, but, there's no time for that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We can keep going! C'mon, we gotta show our fighting spirit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Hmm, I suppose we do only have so many days to train here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Should I change the training routine? Maybe they should be running more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Yeah, you're right. Our number one priority is not getting hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Our number one priority is not getting hurt. All right![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}You know what, you're right. I am the one who did all the research on how to avoid straining yourself. All right, listen up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I'm your coach now, so you stop running when I tell you to stop![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}That's a promise you've gotta keep![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But in return, I'll make sure you get faster than you've ever been![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}How does that sound? Think you can keep that promise?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}What did you just call me...? All right, those who agree to the terms, go back to your break![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Sometimes I can't tell if they're actually listening to me or not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}But this kinda feels good, doesn't it? Like some coming-of-age story.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}...So, um, thanks for giving your input earlier. Honestly, if I was on my own, I would've let them keep running.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}I'm glad I asked you to coach with me. It means a lot having you here, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko is starting to trust me more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}The kids seem like they want to run with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Do you think you could do just one lap? It'd be setting a good example for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I practiced with the children[n]until the sun went down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
